description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and tags, and on pull requests. The workflow has two jobs: tests and publish. The tests job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9, checking out the code, installing dependencies, running tox and pre-commit, and uploading results to Codecov. The publish job depends on tests, runs on ubuntu-latest if a tag or release event occurs, checks out the code, installs dependencies, sets the tag and module version, and builds and publishes to PyPI if the tag matches the module version.
